query: Could you please create a 5-day travel plan for me, starting from Los Angeles and visiting 2 cities in Colorado between March 13th and March 17th, 2022? My budget for the trip is $4,700.

plan.transportation: F3822873, from Los Angeles to Colorado Springs
plan.accommodation: Large sunny park slope apartment, Colorado Springs

plan.breakfast: Raglan Road Irish Pub and Restaurant, Colorado Springs
plan.attraction: Garden of the Gods;The Broadmoor Seven Falls;Cave of the Winds Mountain Park;
plan.accommodation: Large sunny park slope apartment, Colorado Springs

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Colorado Springs to Grand Junction
plan.breakfast: Raglan Road Irish Pub and Restaurant, Colorado Springs
plan.accommodation: Cool room Manhattan - Sleeps up to 3 guests, Grand Junction

plan.attraction: Museum of the West, Museums of Western Colorado;Eureka! McConnell Science Museum;Bananas Fun Park;
